    INNER JOIN "RestaurantTables" AS r ON d."TableId" = r."Id"
    WHERE o."Id" = @__orderId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN "OrderItems" AS o0 ON t."Id" = o0."OrderId"
ORDER BY t."Id", t."Id0", t."Id1"
